reason: Agent responded correctly to a math question within seconds, confirming agent is functional and responsive.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar
Found "QA-20260505-015541-kc1h" agent in sidebar and clicked it — Agent page opened and loaded successfully
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" before message, then "working" while processing response
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed successfully into input field
Clicked Send message button — Message sent successfully and chat view appeared
Waited for response (received within 1 second, well under 3-minute timeout) — Agent responded with "4"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer to the math question
